summary: Tested P0 and P1 bug fixes for Hispaloshop. All P0 bugs verified FIXED: internal chat APIs working, image uploads return Cloudinary HTTPS URLs, Stripe endpoints return proper JSON errors (not NameError). P1 UI fixes verified in code: Hi AI uses Sparkles icon, AI chat z-index is z-50 (above bottom nav z-40).

minor.issue: Returns Stripe Connect configuration error (expected - Stripe account not set up for Connect)

critical_code_review_comments: P0 FIX VERIFIED: internal_chat.py imports chat_manager from core/websocket.py (shared ConnectionManager)
P0 FIX VERIFIED: core/websocket.py created with ConnectionManager class and chat_manager singleton
P0 FIX VERIFIED: uploads.py returns Cloudinary HTTPS URLs (res.cloudinary.com)
P0 FIX VERIFIED: influencer.py has 'import stripe' at line 7 and stripe.api_key at line 18
P0 FIX VERIFIED: producer.py has 'import stripe' at line 13
P1 FIX VERIFIED: BottomNavBar.js uses Sparkles icon from lucide-react (line 3, 32)
P1 FIX VERIFIED: AIAssistant.js line 677 has z-50 (above BottomNavBar z-40 at line 160)
Frontend URL handling FIX VERIFIED: ProducerProducts.js line 73 checks if URL starts with 'http' before prepending backend URL

success_rate.backend: 100% (15 passed, 1 skipped due to Cloudflare transient error)

seed_data_creation: Test images uploaded to Cloudinary during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 bugs FIXED and verified: (1) Internal chat endpoints working - chat_manager shared via core/websocket.py, (2) Image uploads return Cloudinary HTTPS URLs, (3) Stripe import fixed in influencer.py and producer.py. P1 UI fixes also verified: Hi AI icon is Sparkles from lucide-react, AI chat has z-50 above bottom nav z-40. Stripe Connect returns proper error about account configuration (not a code bug).

features_verified.hi_ai_sparkles_icon: PASS - Uses Sparkles from lucide-react (verified in code)

p0_bugs_summary.broken_image_uploads: FIXED - Cloudinary returns HTTPS URLs, frontend checks if URL starts with http before prepending backend URL
p0_bugs_summary.internal_chat_errors: FIXED - chat_manager now imported from shared core/websocket.py module
p0_bugs_summary.stripe_connection_errors: FIXED - Added 'import stripe' to influencer.py (line 7) and stripe.api_key (line 18). Endpoint now returns proper Stripe API error instead of NameError

p1_bugs_summary.hi_ai_wrong_icon: FIXED - HiAIIcon component uses Sparkles from lucide-react
p1_bugs_summary.ai_chat_behind_nav: FIXED - AI chat has z-50, bottom nav has z-40
